Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse

Class SseResponseSupport

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse.SseResponseSupport
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class SseResponseSupport extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Fluent SSE response helper.
